accurate.why: Accurately describes reauthorizing the Building Communities of Recovery program through FY2030; the SAMHSA/Center for Substance Abuse Treatment administration is correct context.

no_hallucinations.why: Program name and administering body are accurate, not invented.

states_purpose.why: States it reauthorizes the recovery-grants program.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Describes amending the Public Health Service Act to reauthorize the grants.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the operative reauthorization; omitting the granular dollar figure is acceptable at a high level.

correct_entities.why: SAMHSA / Center for Substance Abuse Treatment correct.

correct_figures.why: FY2030 is correct; no figure is misstated.
